sos.hint: Need urgent help? Tap to alert coordinators.
sos.dialogSubtitle: We’ll notify disaster coordinators with your profile.
sos.needLoginDetail: We attach your name, district, email, and phone so responders can reach you.
sos.confirmText: This sends an urgent SOS to the admin dashboard with your account details. Only use in a real emergency.
sos.messagePlaceholder: e.g. Trapped near Kalutara bridge, need evacuation…

sos.sendFailed: Could not send SOS. Try again.

volunteerHub.heroSubtitle: Help communities respond faster during emergencies.
volunteerHub.missionsIntro: Active missions added by team. Coordinators will post required volunteers and skills here.
volunteerHub.missionsEmpty: No active missions right now. Team will add missions when response is needed.
volunteerHub.joinRequireVolunteer: Complete your volunteer application to join missions.
volunteerHub.rolesIntro: Pick a path that matches your skills. One application covers every role — tell us how you can help.
volunteerHub.roleEmergencyDesc: On-the-ground support during evacuations, medical triage, and urgent community checks.
volunteerHub.roleEmergencySkills: First aid, physical fitness, calm under pressure
volunteerHub.roleReporterDesc: Document conditions with photos and short reports so coordinators see what teams on site cannot.
volunteerHub.roleReporterSkills: Mobile data, clear writing, map apps
volunteerHub.roleShelterDesc: Help set up, register families, and keep temporary shelters organised and dignified.
volunteerHub.roleShelterSkills: Organisation, languages, childcare or elder support
volunteerHub.roleSupplyDesc: Move dry rations, water, and kits from hubs to wards and community leaders safely.
volunteerHub.roleRemoteDesc: Verify social posts, translate updates, and clean spreadsheets when the ops room is overloaded.
volunteerHub.roleRemoteSkills: Sinhala / Tamil / English, spreadsheets, attention to detail
volunteerHub.impactVerified: You are a verified volunteer — thank you for staying ready.
volunteerHub.impactTeaser: Register below to join missions and have your work counted toward community response.
volunteerHub.applyIntro: Submit once. Team review every application before you receive the verified badge.
volunteerHub.needLoginApply: Sign in to submit your volunteer application.

helpSupport.title: Help & Support
helpSupport.subtitle: Find answers to common questions, access emergency contacts, or reach out to our support team for assistance.
helpSupport.emergencySubtitle: Save these numbers. Call immediately in an emergency.
helpSupport.faqSubtitle: Quick answers to common questions about DisasterWatch
helpSupport.faq1Question: How do I receive disaster alerts?
helpSupport.faq1Answer: Sign up for an account and enable notifications for your district. You'll receive real-time alerts via email and push notifications when disasters are detected in your area. You can also view all active alerts on the Alerts page.
helpSupport.faq2Question: What should I do during an emergency?
helpSupport.faq2Answer: First, stay calm and check active alerts and incidents on DisasterWatch. Follow instructions from emergency services, evacuate if advised, and contact emergency hotlines if you need immediate assistance. Keep emergency contacts saved and have an evacuation plan ready.
helpSupport.faq3Question: How do I find the nearest shelter?
helpSupport.faq3Answer: Visit the Shelters page to view all active emergency shelters near you. Each shelter shows location, capacity, and available facilities. During emergencies, shelters are updated in real-time with availability information.
helpSupport.faq4Question: How can I volunteer for disaster response?
helpSupport.faq4Answer: Visit the Volunteer page to submit an application. Choose your preferred roles (emergency response, field reporter, shelter support, supply distribution, or remote data support). Once approved, you can join active missions and help communities respond faster.
helpSupport.faq5Question: How do I report an incident or missing person?
helpSupport.faq5Answer: Use the Incidents page to report emergencies, damage, or missing persons. Provide as much detail as possible including location, photos, and descriptions. Reports help coordinators allocate resources and respond effectively.
helpSupport.guidesSubtitle: Learn how to use key features of DisasterWatch
helpSupport.guide1Desc: Stay informed with real-time disaster alerts for your district
helpSupport.guide2Desc: Report emergencies, damage, or missing persons to help coordinators
helpSupport.guide3Desc: Locate nearby shelters with capacity and facility information
helpSupport.guide4Desc: Apply to volunteer and join active missions in your area
helpSupport.contactSubtitle: Can't find what you need? Send us a message
helpSupport.formSuccess: Message sent! We'll get back to you soon.
